title: On Holding Q2 2024 Earnings: Record Net Sales and Strong Margin Expansion
text: On Holding achieved record Q2 2024 net sales of CHF 567.7 million, representing 27.8% growth year-over-year (29.4% on constant currency basis). Gross profit margin improved to 59.9% from 59.5% in the prior year period. Net income reached CHF 30.8 million. Key metrics included adjusted diluted EPS of CHF 0.14 (up from CHF 0.04) and adjusted EBITDA of CHF 90.8 million. The 12-month rolling sales exceeded CHF 2 billion Swiss francs. Business performance by channel showed wholesale expanding 29% while direct-to-consumer increased 30%, driven by both retail locations and digital channels. The company operates 25 stores in China and 12 in other markets. Regional results showed Asia Pacific surging 73.7% to CHF 59.2 million, EMEA growing 21.8% to CHF 138.4 million, and the Americas increasing 24.8% to CHF 370 million. Apparel sales jumped 63% to CHF 21.9 million driven by successful tennis apparel launch. Preorders for fall apparel lines had doubled.
